Identifies the type of the control flow transfer recorded in the entry, using the
encodings listed in Table 33. Implementations that do not support this field will report
0.
Cycle Count Valid. See Cycle Counting.

Cycle Count, composed of the Cycle Count Exponent (CCE, in CC[15:12]) and Cycle
Count Mantissa (CCM, in CC[11:0]). See Cycle Counting.
